title: ATDD prompt not followed: no failing-first, atomic, independent acceptance tests
evidence: prompt=ATDD required client-perspective acceptance tests that are atomic/independent and each start from an empty service. simple_test.py:13 is one monolithic test_api() that runs create->list->get->update->delete sharing a single book with no per-scenario reset; verify_implementation.py:68 verify_requirements() greps app.py source and always returns True (asserts on HOW, not behavior). No red/green or tests-first evidence.
suggestion: Split into independent HTTP-level acceptance scenarios (one per requirement), each resetting to an empty store; delete the grep-based verifier which is not a behavioral test.

title: Fewer than 3 unit/integration tests; test_coverage only 0.07
evidence: Only one discoverable test function exists: simple_test.py:13 test_api(). verify_implementation.py contains verify_* helpers (not test_ functions, no behavioral assertions). scores.json test_coverage=0.07 (>0 so R12 minimally runs, but the '>=3 tests' deliverable is unmet).
suggestion: Add at least 3 independent tests covering create, validation-rejection, filter, get-by-id-404, update, and delete.

title: verify_implementation.py masquerades as a test but never exercises behavior
evidence: verify_implementation.py:68-104 verify_requirements() prints requirements and returns True unconditionally; verify_app_structure()/verify_code_quality() only grep app.py strings. No endpoint is called.
suggestion: Remove or convert to real behavioral assertions against the running service.

title: app_clean.py is a dead near-duplicate of app.py
evidence: app_clean.py:1-200 duplicates app.py verbatim except for an unused clear_all_books() helper (app_clean.py:31-37). Not imported or run by anything (summary/index.md:10).
suggestion: Delete app_clean.py or fold clear_all_books() into app.py.

title: Flask runs with debug=True bound to 0.0.0.0
evidence: app.py:192 app.run(debug=True, host='0.0.0.0', port=5000) exposes the Werkzeug interactive debugger (RCE) on all interfaces.
suggestion: Disable debug in any non-local run and bind to 127.0.0.1 by default.
